calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-24-2012 Amended

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-25-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change Name of a minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Kay Tsenin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Self-represented Petitioner Karina Yusopova (mother) present and appearing on behalf of minor Samuel Ethan Yusupov.
Consent of father Sai Shavit to Name Change of Minor on file.
Petitioner sworn and examined. Proof of Publication on file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change Name of a minor to Samuel Gal Shavit.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
